special_mechanics.name: Variable Jump Height
special_mechanics.description: Jazz runs faster and jumps higher the longer he runs, enabling him to clear larger chasms

special_mechanics.name: Hoverboard Flight
special_mechanics.description: Pickup item that allows Jazz to fly, temporarily enabling aerial mobility

special_mechanics.name: Speed-Up Bonus
special_mechanics.description: Temporary pickup that increases Jazz's movement speed

special_mechanics.name: Multiple Weapon Types
special_mechanics.description: Jazz can equip various weapons (Blaster, Bouncer, Toaster, RF Missile, TNT) affecting combat but not core movement

tier_notes: Tier 2 data: Only qualitative gameplay descriptions available. Wikipedia documents that Jazz gains speed/height through sustained running, indicating momentum-based physics, but exact numerical physics parameters are not publicly documented in available sources.
